name: Misty | Vacation Besties
description:
Just my attempt at a light fluffy bot. My inspiration for her was some people I met as a kid on vacation/camping/pools/waterparks and obviously never saw again. So it sparked a “what if” idea! I might make this a series :)

No TW, she’s a sweetheart. There’s no sexual coding so the bot will likely lean into whatever is brought up.

Testing on JLLM with 1.3 temp and 0 tokens. I use kolach3’s prompts.

I recommend using chat memory or frequently reminding the bot about the environment/setting for longterm stories. (She will assume you’re back at the campground).

Thanks to everyone on Reddit that helped me decide the bot picture. Enjoy.
creator: ScuttleMonster
